---
description: 'System table containing descriptions of table engines supported by the
  server and the features they support.'
keywords: ['system table', 'table_engines']
slug: /operations/system-tables/table_engines
title: 'system.table_engines'
doc_type: 'reference'
---

## Description {#description}

Contains description of table engines supported by server and their feature support information.

This table contains the following columns (the column type is shown in brackets):

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) вҖ” The name of table engine.
- `supports_settings` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) вҖ” Flag that indicates if table engine supports SETTINGS clause.
- `supports_skipping_indices` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) вҖ” Flag that indicates if table engine supports skipping indices.
- `supports_projections` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) вҖ” Flag that indicated if table engine supports projections.
- `supports_sort_order` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) вҖ” Flag that indicates if table engine supports clauses PARTITION_BY, PRIMARY_KEY, ORDER_BY and SAMPLE_BY.
- `supports_ttl` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) вҖ” Flag that indicates if table engine supports TTL.
- `supports_replication` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) вҖ” Flag that indicates if table engine supports data replication.
- `supports_deduplication` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) вҖ” Flag that indicates if table engine supports data deduplication.
- `supports_parallel_insert` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) вҖ” Flag that indicates if table engine supports parallel insert (see max_insert_threads setting).
- `description` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) вҖ” A high-level description of what the table engine does.
- `syntax` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) вҖ” How the table engine is specified in the ENGINE clause of a CREATE TABLE query.
- `examples` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) вҖ” Usage examples.
- `introduced_in` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) вҖ” The ClickHouse version in which the table engine was first introduced, in the form major.minor.
- `related` ([Array](/sql-reference/data-types/array)([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string))) вҖ” The names of related table engines.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->

## Example {#example}

```sql title="Query"
SELECT
    name,
    supports_settings,
    supports_skipping_indices,
    supports_sort_order,
    supports_ttl,
    supports_replication,
    supports_deduplication,
    supports_parallel_insert
FROM system.table_engines
WHERE name IN ('Kafka', 'MergeTree', 'ReplicatedCollapsingMergeTree')
```

```text title="Response"
в”Ңв”Җnameв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җsupports_settingsв”Җв”¬в”Җsupports_skipping_indicesв”Җв”¬в”Җsupports_sort_orderв”Җв”¬в”Җsupports_ttlв”Җв”¬в”Җsupports_replicationв”Җв”¬в”Җsupports_deduplicationв”Җв”¬в”Җsupports_parallel_insertв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ MergeTree                     в”Ӯ                 1 в”Ӯ                         1 в”Ӯ                   1 в”Ӯ            1 в”Ӯ                    0 в”Ӯ                      0 в”Ӯ                        1 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Kafka                         в”Ӯ                 1 в”Ӯ                         0 в”Ӯ                   0 в”Ӯ            0 в”Ӯ                    0 в”Ӯ                      0 в”Ӯ                        0 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ ReplicatedCollapsingMergeTree в”Ӯ                 1 в”Ӯ                         1 в”Ӯ                   1 в”Ӯ            1 в”Ӯ                    1 в”Ӯ                      1 в”Ӯ                        1 в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```
